        *   No nested `metadata`.
        *   One item in `posts` array.
        *   No story characters, real people, etc.
        *   Self-contained case.
        *   No `Needs Review` as primary action.
        *   `correctEscalationReason`: "" (since action is Remove).
        *   `acceptableEscalationReasons`: [] (since action is Remove).
